name: Request Fulfillment Agentic Workflow
serviceNowSurface: AI Agent Studio plus Flow Designer handoff
businessOutcome: Guide request fulfillment by checking completeness, policy fit, and required approvals before a Flow Designer handoff.
steps: Identify automation path or manual task owner.
Hand off eligible requests to a controlled flow.
Log the decision and next action.
approvalPoints: Before high-cost or privileged access requests
tests: Missing variable returns a clarification request.
Eligible standard request produces a flow handoff plan.
